extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won Stage 7 after BORA demolished sprint field on brutal opening climbs, while PORTE/LANDA/POGAČAR lost 1:20-2:53 in final 40km positioning failure.
tactical_patterns: BORA placed SAGAN fifth wheel on opening Cat-3 to crack sprinters when he couldn't match pure speed.
INEOS joined front-pacing early on hilly sprint stage, signaling willingness to fragment field before Pyrenees.
GC contenders PORTE/LANDA/POGAČAR lost 1:20+ in final 40km despite only 13s gaps pre-stage, catastrophic positioning.
Tailwind made opening climbs harder for sprinters to survive, contrary to conventional climbing expectations.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: Recognized sprint form deficit pre-race, orchestrated team to eliminate sprint competition via attrition instead of contesting finale.
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Lost green jersey after being dropped on opening climbs despite BORA targeting him specifically.
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: Lost 2:53 despite starting only 13s behind yellow, catastrophic positioning day before Pyrenees.
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: Lost 1:20 in final 40km on moderate stage, concerning positioning error pre-mountains.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Lost 1:21 same group as Pogačar, poor team support visible.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Third stage win already, Jumbo-Visma controlling race tempo across all terrain types.
